# Tech rout sparks Bitcoin $60K support test

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | June 12, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
With $1.9 billion exiting the spot Bitcoin ETFs and tech stocks under pressure, BTC is failing as a hedge and at risk of falling below the $60,000 support.

## ⚡ Why This Matters (The Macro View)
While most outlets report the 'what', our intelligence engine focuses on the 'why'. This development in Crypto isn't just a news item; it's a structural pivot.
